The Native Liquidity Layer Of Linea

Step into the heart of Linea's intrinsic on-chain liquidity marketplace. Driven by state-of-the-art DEX infrastructure, we present an exceptionally efficient DeFi solution. Immerse yourself in the capabilities of Lynex now!

Swap Your Tokens
With Low Slippage

Lynex's smart routing, deep liquidity, and latest AMM technology allow you to enjoy low slippage and high return when swapping one cryptocurrency for another.

Swap Now
Stake and Earn
Passive Income

Stake your assets for instant passive income streams. No deposit or withdrawal fees. You have full control over your funds.

Start Staking
Liquidity Layer
for Linea blockchain

Lynex was designed to onboard the next generation of protocols to the Linea blockchain by opening up a free market for LYNX emissions. Protocols can bribe veLYNX holders or acquire veLYNX to redirect emissions to their pools, offering a flexible and capital efficient solution to bootstrap and scale liquidity.

Go Vote

How It Works

Control Lynex's destiny by locking into veLYNX.
veLYNX Holders
Protocols

STEP 1

Lock LYNX Token

and Receive veLYNX

Lock LYNX for up to 2 years to receive vote-escrowed LYNX (veLYNX). The longer the lock, the more veLYNX you receive.

STEP 2

Use veLYNX to Vote

for Your Favorite Pools

veLYNX gives you the power to decide which pools should receive LYNX emissions.

STEP 3

Receive Bribes

and Trading Fees

Voting for a pool lets you claim a share of the weekly bribes and trading fees.

STEP 3

Receive Bribes

and Trading Fees

Voting for a pool lets you claim a share of the weekly bribes and trading fees.

Lock LYNX Token

and Receive veLYNX

Lock LYNX for up to 2 years to receive vote-escrowed LYNX (veLYNX). The longer the lock, the more veLYNX you receive.

veLYNX gives you the power to decide which pools should receive LYNX emissions.

and Trading Fees

Voting for a pool lets you claim a share of the weekly bribes and trading fees.

Pluno

Introduction to Lynex FI

Lynex FI is the DeFi-native liquidity layer built on the Linea Blockchain, combining powerful automated market-making technology for optimized liquidity and efficiency.

Features of Lynex FI

By integrating elements from Curve, Convex, and Velodrome, Lynex FI offers advanced features such as low slippage, enhanced liquidity, and a seamless trading experience.

How Lynex FI Enhances DeFi Liquidity

Lynex FI ensures deep liquidity and highly efficient trading by employing state-of-the-art AMM models, providing users with fast and reliable transactions.

Why Lynex FI is the Future of DeFi

With cutting-edge technology and cross-protocol integration, Lynex FI is poised to become a leader in the decentralized finance space, offering unmatched performance and scalability.

How to Start Using Lynex FI

Get started with Lynex FI by connecting your wallet, adding liquidity, and taking full advantage of the platform's advanced tools and high reward potential.

Understanding the AMM System of Lynex FI

The advanced AMM system used by Lynex FI maximizes liquidity provision, ensuring optimal conditions for both liquidity providers and traders.

Liquidity Pools and Rewards on Lynex FI

Provide liquidity to pools and earn rewards through staking or transaction fees, making the most of your assets in the DeFi ecosystem.

High-Performance Trading on Lynex FI

Trade seamlessly with low slippage and high execution speed, thanks to Lynex FI’s optimized AMM technology and DeFi-native liquidity solutions.

Security Features of Lynex FI

Lynex FI utilizes robust security measures to ensure your assets and transactions are safe, offering confidence to all users within the platform.

Future Developments in Lynex FI

As the DeFi landscape evolves, Lynex FI continues to develop new features and integrations, ensuring a continuously improving user experience.

Joining the Lynex FI Community

Become a part of the thriving Lynex FI community, where you can participate in governance, share insights, and help drive the platform's future growth.
